name: Samara Joy
abstract: Samara Joy McLendon (born November 11, 1999) is an American jazz singer. She released her self-titled debut album in 2021 and was subsequently named Best New Artist by JazzTimes.

concerts.label: Samara Joy, Singer
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli
about_quotes.evidence: last week’s show there was at least four new singers out there, or jazz musicians like Isaiah and Benny Benack III and Samara Joy and this girl Katie Kortum.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 18, 2023 [interview 2 of 2]
